title: Maintain derived docs from daily notes
goal: Execute the daily-notes-to-doc maintenance pass in one run. Read the daily-note inputs, detect any additional note files in the fixture workspace, compare them with the source-agent runtime state, then write the derived docs, runtime state, and run report. Do not stop after analysis: the task is only complete after the required files are written.
extra_context:
Allowed scope only: demo/automation_poller/daily_notes_doc/fixtures/workspace/memory/daily-notes, demo/automation_poller/daily_notes_doc/fixtures/workspace/memory/doc/daily-note-derived, and demo/automation_poller/daily_notes_doc/jobs/daily-notes-to-doc.

Perform these steps in order:
1. List all *.md files in demo/automation_poller/daily_notes_doc/fixtures/workspace/memory/daily-notes and sort by note id.
2. Read demo/automation_poller/daily_notes_doc/jobs/daily-notes-to-doc/state/runtime-state.json if it exists. If it does not exist, treat the prior state as: processed_notes=[], last_processed_note=null, run_count=0, last_run_started_at=null, last_run_finished_at=null, next_run_at=null, last_status=null, last_report_path=null.
3. Compute pending notes as note files not present in processed_notes.
4. Always ensure these files exist under demo/automation_poller/daily_notes_doc/fixtures/workspace/memory/doc/daily-note-derived: README.md, current-state.md, decisions.md, open-questions.md, source-map.md.

Write the derived docs using this exact schema:
- README.md:
  # Daily Note Derived Doc Definition
  Include sections: ## Required Files, ## Citation Rules, ## State Rules.
- current-state.md:
  # Daily Note Derived Current State
  Intro sentence.
  ## Stable Signals
  ## Active Workstreams
  ## Recent Changes
  ## Coverage
- decisions.md:
  # Derived Decisions
  Intro sentence.
  ## Active Decisions
  ## Archived Decisions
- open-questions.md:
  # Derived Open Questions
  Intro sentence.
  ## Open Questions
  ## Recently Resolved
- source-map.md:
  # Daily Note Source Map
  Intro sentence.
  ## Processed Notes
  Include a markdown table with header: | Note | Sections Contributed | Summary |
  ## Coverage Summary

Content rules:
- Rebuild docs from all processed notes after adding pending notes, not only from the new notes.
- Aggregate duplicate statements instead of repeating them.
- Every non-trivial bullet in current-state.md, decisions.md, and open-questions.md must be followed by a Source notes: line.
- Every citation must use a relative markdown link in the form ../../daily-notes/<note-id>.md.
- decisions.md entries use these three lines per decision: '- Decision: ...', '  Status: active', '  Source notes: ...'.
- open-questions.md entries use these three lines per question: '- Question: ...', '  Status: open', '  Source notes: ...'.
- source-map.md must contain one row per processed note, sorted, with no duplicates.

Then write demo/automation_poller/daily_notes_doc/jobs/daily-notes-to-doc/state/runtime-state.json as JSON with at least these keys:
- run_count
- last_run_started_at
- last_run_finished_at
- next_run_at
- last_status
- processed_notes
- last_processed_note
- last_report_path
State rules:
- Increment run_count by 1 from the previous state.
- Set last_run_started_at and last_run_finished_at to this run's timestamps in ISO-8601 format.
- Set next_run_at to roughly 20 seconds after last_run_started_at, because this demo config polls every 20 seconds.
- If pending notes were ingested, set last_status to updated and include all processed note ids in processed_notes.
- If there were no pending notes, leave the derived docs unchanged and set last_status to skipped.

Then write one markdown report under demo/automation_poller/daily_notes_doc/jobs/daily-notes-to-doc/reports named <timestamp>-daily-notes-to-doc.md when updated or <timestamp>-no-new-notes.md when skipped. The report must include the heading '# Daily Notes To Doc Run' and list the pending notes processed or say that no new daily notes were detected.

Use apply_patch for edits. Do not inspect unrelated directories. Finish with one short sentence that states whether the run updated docs or skipped.
